prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约4343名→3626名→3254名→5516名→3374名，整体呈波动走势。2024年因贵州省首次实施新高考（物理类），位次出现较大波动（5516名），2025年迅速回稳至3374名，较2023年小幅后移约120名，近两年基准位次约3300–3400名区间；该校在贵州省招生计划：2021年141人→2022年100人→2023年100人→2024年109人→2025年112人→2026年134人。2026年较2025年扩招22人（+19.6%），扩招幅度较大，按供需关系将导致最低录取位次明显后移（数字增大），竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第39名，近年排名稳定在38–41名区间，属于国内顶尖211高校，在电子信息领域享有极高声誉，对高分考生吸引力强；2025年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面（涉及校园安全事件），但事件影响范围有限；抖音热度总排名第60位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，反映该校在考生群体中有一定关注度。；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科，在电子信息领域学科实力位居全国前列，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"等级，社会关注度和报考意愿持续高涨；贵州省2026年高考总人数约299000人，物理类按近年占比约69%估算约206310人，与2025年207171人基本持平，考生规模稳定。；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省西安市，与贵州省同属西部地区，地域偏好适中；该校在贵州招生计划占比较小（约2%左右），地域因素对报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3374名、2026年大幅扩招19.6%（使位次后移）以及电子信息类专业持续高热（吸引竞争，使位次前移）等多重因素，扩招效应略占主导，但专业热度对报考的拉动作用部分抵消了扩招带来的竞争缓解。预测2026年最低录取位次约3742名，较2025年后移约368名，波动区间3242–4242名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（智能）（包含人工智能、智能科学与技术）
- 电子信息类（集成电路）（包含微电子科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 计算机类（包含计算机科学与技术、软件工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（通信）（包含通信工程、信息工程、空间信息与数字技术）
- 计算机类（网络安全）（包含信息安全、网络空间安全）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）（包含电子信息工程、信息对抗技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）（包含机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计、自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）
- 材料类（电子材料与微纳器件）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间3242–4242名内的考生，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（3242名以内）可重点冲击一档的计算机类（智能）和电子信息类（集成电路）王牌专业；位次在区间中段（3500–4000名）以二档通信、网络安全类为主；位次接近区间上限（4000名以上）建议以三档自动化类保底，同时关注扩招带来的录取机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 4343 → 3626 → 3254 → 5516 → 3374, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, due to the first implementation of the new Gaokao (Physics Category) in Guizhou Province, the ranking experienced a significant fluctuation (5516), but quickly stabilized to 3374 in 2025, slightly shifting back by about 120 positions compared to 2023, with a recent baseline range of approximately 3300–3400. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou Province: 2021: 141 → 2022: 100 → 2023: 100 → 2024: 109 → 2025: 112 → 2026: 134. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 22 students (+19.6%), a relatively large increase, which, according to supply-demand dynamics, will cause the minimum admission ranking to significantly shift back (increase in number), easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 39th, with a stable ranking in the 38–41 range in recent years. It is a top-tier 211 university in China, enjoying a very high reputation in the field of electronic information, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. During the 2025 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative (involving a campus safety incident), but the impact of the incident was limited. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 60th (relatively hot), with above-average exposure on short video platforms, reflecting a certain level of attention among candidates. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Electronic Science and Technology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Cyberspace Security (A), and Mechanical Engineering (A-), totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above, placing it among the top in the country in the electronic information field, highly matching its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with sustained high social attention and application willingness. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province is approximately 299,000, with the Physics Category accounting for about 69% in recent years, estimated at about 206,310, roughly the same as the 207,171 in 2025, indicating a stable candidate pool. Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, which, like Guizhou Province, belongs to the western region, with moderate geographical preference. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou accounts for a small proportion (about 2%), so geographical factors have limited impact on application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3374, the significant enrollment expansion of 19.6% in 2026 (causing the ranking to shift back), and the sustained high popularity of electronic information majors (attracting competition, causing the ranking to shift forward), the expansion effect slightly dominates, but the pulling effect of major popularity partially offsets the competition relief brought by expansion. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be approximately 3742, shifting back by about 368 positions compared to 2025, with a fluctuation range of 3242–4242.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer (Intelligent) (includes Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits) (includes Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Computer (includes Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Communication) (includes Communication Engineering, Information Engineering, Space Information and Digital Technology)
- Computer (Cybersecurity) (includes Information Security, Cyberspace Security)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering) (includes Electronic Information Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control) (includes Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.)
- Materials (Electronic Materials and Micro-Nano Devices)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 3242–4242 are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as reach options, and Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3242) can focus on reaching for the flagship majors in Tier 1, such as Computer (Intelligent) and Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (3500–4000) should mainly apply for Tier 2 majors like Communication and Cybersecurity. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (above 4000) are advised to use Tier 3 majors like Automation as safety options, while also paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the enrollment expansion.
